product: ARCS WIFO (ARCS WIDE + ARCS FOCUS) — discontinued/legacy constant-curvature WST line source enclosures

electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Per-variant peak SPL at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4: ARCS Wide 137 dB, ARCS Focus 139 dB (both [ARCS_WIFO] preset). Extends to 32 Hz when paired with SB18m subwoofers.
electroacoustic.directivity: Constant-curvature WST: ARCS Wide 30 deg x 90 deg (H x V), ARCS Focus 15 deg x 90 deg (-6 dB). Total array coverage scales with element count: N x 30 deg for Wide, N x 15 deg for Focus.
electroacoustic.components: 2-way passive: 1 x 12" weather-resistant bass-reflex LF + 1 x 3" diaphragm compression driver on DOSC waveguide. RMS power handling 450 W.

operating_modes: passive (single amplifier channel per enclosure, PA signal)
amplification.per_amplifier_note: App input specifies LA4 = 4 (one enclosure per output channel). Manual also documents LA8 driving up to 8 (two enclosures paralleled per channel at 4 ohms); LA12X is listed as a compatible controller.
amplification.preset_note: [ARCS_WIFO] = reference response for medium-throw arrays; [ARCS_WIFO_FI] = short-throw / single-enclosure (fill) response. [SB18_60] and cardioid [SB18_60_C] apply to paired SB18m subwoofers, not the ARCS enclosure itself.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4): 1x IN, 1x LINK (daisy-chain). Internal pinout uses pins 1+/1- only; pins 2+/2- not used.
connection.breakouts: DOSUB-LA8 (8-point PA-COM to 4x 2-point speakON) for LA8 fan-out; SP-Y1 (4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON) with CC4FP adapter for splitting LA4/LA4X channel pairs.

physical.weight_note: Net weight per variant: ARCS Wide 36 kg / 79 lb, ARCS Focus 38 kg / 84 lb.
physical.dimensions_mm: 365/140 x 759 x 444 (W front/rear x H x D) — trapezoidal cabinet, 365 mm wide front face tapering to 140 mm rear
physical.cabinet: Baltic birch plywood; steel grille with anti-corrosion coating and Airnet acoustically neutral fabric; finishes Dark Grey Brown (Pantone 426C), Pure White (RAL 9010) or custom RAL.

modes: ground-stacked (on ground or on SB18m subwoofers)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: Up to 8 ARCS Wide/Focus flown on WIFOBUMP frame (vertical); 4 per WIFOLIFT and up to 5-6 per WIFOLIFTBAR (horizontal). Max 4 ARCS Wide/Focus flown beneath SB18m in a hybrid vertical array.
deployment.inter_element_angles: Inter-element splay is set per Soundvision modeling using WIFOTILT site-angle reference holes; no fixed discrete-angle table for the coupling plane (constant-curvature coupling is inherent to the cabinet geometry).
rigging_accessories: WIFORIG coupling bars (2 supplied per enclosure)
WIFOTILT stacking/tilt accessory (up to 4 on SB18m)

usage: Legacy constant-curvature WST enclosure for medium-throw rental and install work where a compact array must cover a wide angle with few boxes; total horizontal spread is N x 30 deg (Wide) or N x 15 deg (Focus).
Choose ARCS Wide for broad coverage and preserved sightlines, ARCS Focus for tighter coverage with longer throw and ~2 dB more peak SPL within the same cabinet footprint.
Each enclosure needs one amplifier channel: an LA4/LA4X drives up to 4 boxes (one per output), while an LA8 drives up to 8 (two paralleled per output at 4 ohms).
Extend low end with SB18m subwoofers (down to 32 Hz); typical splits like 3x ARCS + 1x SB18m on an LA4X or 4x ARCS + 4x SB18m on an LA8, with reversed subs on OUT 1 for cardioid.
Load the [ARCS_WIFO] preset for multi-box medium-throw arrays and [ARCS_WIFO_FI] for single-enclosure or short-throw fill duty.

Deploy flown (WIFOBUMP/WIFOLIFT/WIFOLIFTBAR, max 8 per array), ground-stacked on SB18m via WIFOTILT (max 4), or pole-mounted via WIFOSOCK (1); always confirm rigging safety factor in Soundvision before flying.
